title: Compliance: lichen-oscore lib.rs OSCORE
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.7. File: rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs. Status: COMPLIANT. Pure-Rust OSCORE implementation with AES-CCM-16-64-128, HKDF-SHA256, replay window, sequence number exhaustion check, and zeroize on drop.
close_reason: Verified compliant: AES-CCM-16-64-128 with HKDF-SHA256 key derivation, correct nonce computation per Section 5.2, replay window with post-decrypt update, sequence exhaustion check, zeroize-on-drop. One documented limitation (empty AAD vs Section 5.4 full structure) is marked ponytail for future work.
